stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 8, a Certificate of Airworthiness shall be renewed or remain valid provided that continuing airworthiness is verified through periodic inspections at appropriate intervals. Alternatively, it may be maintained by…

options.a: A system of inspection approved by the State that produces at least an equivalent result.
options.b: Having the necessary maintenance facilities available to the owner.
options.c: Ensuring the aircraft has sustained no damage of any kind.
options.d: A system of inspection approved by the operator that produces at least an equivalent result.
